meta.intent: Teach that visible water proximity changes rescue priority by making the lower puppy the obvious first rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the lower puppy's route groups first, extract it with wide water margin, then use the opened upper groups to rescue the safer puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends early actions on the upper puppy and sees the lower puppy sit closer to the forecast row than necessary.
meta.whatItProves: Water can sharpen target priority without creating real-time pressure or harsh first-contact punishment.
meta.notes: Role: teach. Empty cells serve route readability, spawn corridors, and mobile-scale target readability while preserving a complete opening board.
